name: About Aberdeen Weekly PC Deals
description: Program documentation for Aberdeen Group's Weekly PC Deals Section, describing methodology for tracking online retailers' lowest prices on name-brand PCs from Compaq, Dell, eMachines, Gateway, HP, and Sony. Defines nine price-point targets from $550 to $1,550+ reflecting the mass-market U.S. consumer PC segment, with weekly winner selection based on processor speed, memory, hard drive, optical drives, and bundled components.
